summary: Iteration 40: Phase 5D Product Comparison Feature testing complete. All 14 backend tests passed. All frontend tests passed. Comparison page displays side-by-side product comparison with amber highlighting for differences. 'Compare with Similar' button on product detail pages works correctly. Suggestions endpoint provides relevant comparison options. Cross-division guardrails working (returns 400 error).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5D Product Comparison feature fully working. Key test URLs: /catalog/compare?products=armar-titanium-plates,2.4mm-lps-distal-radial-volar-buttress-plate (shows comparison table with 13 rows, amber highlighting on differences). Empty state at /catalog/compare shows 'Browse Portfolio' button. Product detail pages have 'Compare with Similar' button (data-testid='catalog-compare-btn'). API endpoints: POST /api/catalog/compare (accepts {slugs: [...]}), GET /api/catalog/compare/suggestions/{slug}. Cross-division comparison blocked with 400 error. System Type values formatted as Title Case (e.g., 'Plate System' not 'plate_system').

api_compare_endpoint.POST /api/catalog/compare with 2 product: PASS - Returns comparison data with products array and comparison rows
api_compare_endpoint.Comparison response has is_different fla: PASS - Rows marked as different when values differ
api_compare_endpoint.Cross-division comparison blocked: PASS - Returns 400 with 'Cannot compare products from different divisions'
api_compare_endpoint.Single product comparison blocked: PASS - Returns 400 with 'Need at least 2 products'

api_suggestions_endpoint.GET /api/catalog/compare/suggestions/{sl: PASS - Returns suggestions with comparison_reason field
api_suggestions_endpoint.Suggestions have comparison_reason: PASS - All suggestions include reason like 'Same clinical category'

frontend_comparison_page.Comparison page with 2 products: PASS - Shows comparison table with product headers
frontend_comparison_page.Product headers with names and subtitles: PASS - Shows 'Titanium Plates' and '2.4mm LPS Distal Radial Volar Buttress Plate'
frontend_comparison_page.Comparison rows with amber highlighting: PASS - 3 rows highlighted (Brand System, Coating, Available Variants)
frontend_comparison_page.Add Product button visible: PASS - Shows '+ Add Product' when <4 products
frontend_comparison_page.13 comparison rows displayed: PASS - Division, Category, Brand System, Material, Coating, System Type, etc.

frontend_empty_state.Empty compare page: PASS - Shows 'Select Products to Compare' message

frontend_single_product_state.Single product compare page: PASS - Shows 'Add at least one more product' message
frontend_single_product_state.Click suggestion adds product: PASS - Comparison table appears after clicking suggestion

frontend_catalog_navigation.Catalog index page: PASS - Shows 4 divisions with product counts
frontend_catalog_navigation.Trauma division page: PASS - Shows 21 products with categories filter
